topics.description: Merged with the app’s built-in guide when ids match.

items.question: (Remote sample) When is SELECT * acceptable?
items.answer: In quick exploration, small prototypes, or when you truly need every column and accept schema churn. For app queries and APIs, list columns explicitly.
items.diagram: Remote packs can include\n  diagram (string)\nand codeExamples[]

codeExamples.title: Example
codeExamples.sql: SELECT id, name FROM users LIMIT 5;
